summary: KOLO CRM Phases 1-6 Testing Complete - All requested features verified working

phase_1_themes: Theme toggle visible on My Profile page (data-testid='theme-toggle')
Light mode is DEFAULT when no preference stored (theme-light class, bg: rgb(249,250,251))
Dark mode displays correctly with proper dark backgrounds (#0A0A0C)
Theme switch works without breaking UI elements
Theme preference persists to backend via /api/auth/preferences
phase_2_prospect_statuses: 5 new statuses available: nouveau, contacte, qualifie, offre, signe
Colored badges on prospect cards in list view (blue for Contacted, gray for New, purple for Qualified, orange for Offer)
Pipeline status selector in prospect detail page with data-testid attributes
Status change triggers 'Status updated!' toast notification
Legacy status mapping works (new->nouveau, in_progress->contacte, etc.)
phase_3_ux_improvements: Contextual message on Today page ('6 overdue tasks to handle', 'Great day ahead', etc.)
Streak counter visible when streak >= 2 days (with Flame icon)
'Overdue — Follow up now' clickable links on overdue tasks (orange color)
AI loading animation shows 'Analyzing [name]'s project...' with spinner
Improved prospect form with status selector and all fields
Cancel subscription button visible on profile page (2 instances)
phase_4_onboarding: 5-step flow: Welcome, Import contacts, Create task, Choose theme, Ready
phase_5_contacts_import: Uses Contact Picker API if available
phase_6_landing_page: Landing page uses dark theme design (theme-dark class)
Hero section with headline and CTA
All text has good contrast on dark background

theme_toggle.details: Light/Dark toggle in My Profile, persists to backend

light_mode_default.details: New users see light mode, stored in localStorage as 'light'

colored_status_badges.details: 5 statuses with distinct colors on prospect cards

status_pipeline_selector.details: Clickable status buttons in prospect detail (data-testid='status-*')

contextual_message.details: Dynamic message based on overdue tasks, time of day

overdue_follow_up_link.details: 'Overdue — Follow up now' links visible and clickable

cancel_subscription_button.details: Visible in profile with trial end note

landing_page_dark_design.details: Dark theme applied, all sections render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 1-6 features implemented and working correctly
Theme system uses CSS variables properly for light/dark modes
Status colors defined in PROSPECT_STATUSES constant with proper color mapping
getProspectStatusInfo helper handles legacy status names gracefully
ThemeContext initializes from localStorage with 'light' as default

seed_data_context.test_user: test@test.com has dark theme preference stored
seed_data_context.prospects: 5 prospects with various statuses (New, Contacted, Qualified)
seed_data_context.overdue_tasks: 6 overdue tasks showing 'Overdue — Follow up now' links

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phases 1-6 verified: 1) Theme toggle works, light is default for new users, 2) Colored status badges on prospects, 3) Contextual messages, overdue links, AI animation working, 4) Onboarding flow exists with 5 steps, 5) Contact import in onboarding, 6) Landing page with dark design. Test user: test@test.com / testtest.
